steps.title: Map the passage's structure
steps.content:
Sentence 1 states the study's conclusion: thinking about values before discussion makes people more polite when hearing disagreement.

The remaining sentences describe the method: experimental vs. control group setup, what each group did, and the comparison of outcomes that supports the conclusion.

steps.title: Match to the choice describing this structure
steps.content:
A requires a "widely held belief" — not introduced. B is about improving the design — not done. C claims surprise — never stated.

D matches: the text states the conclusion and explains how the team arrived at it (their experimental setup). D is correct.
